# CardHabit

> A card-based habit tracker for iOS where your friends can make your daily challenges harder before you've finished them. Five cards a day, two or three commitments, one ritual. Launching August 2026.

CardHabit is an iOS app currently in late-stage development by Brandon Kessinger (@KessingerBuilds). It launches in August 2026 with a free tier and founder pricing for waitlist members.

## What it is

Every morning, the app deals five challenge cards — one per category (Physical, Mental, Nutrition, Recovery, Wildcard). You commit to two or three. Completing a card earns a "vault card" — a play that can be spent on a friend's next draw to make it harder (Sabotage) or better (Buff). What you commit to is locked: friends can only affect tomorrow's hand, never today's commitments.

After completing the first ten cards, you unlock one of five archetypes that shape your deck: Ironclad (Physical · Discipline), Sage (Mental · Clarity), Alchemist (Nutrition · Balance), Phantom (Recovery · Silence), or Vanguard (Breadth · Range).

## Key facts

- **Platform**: iOS
- **Category**: Habit tracker, lifestyle app
- **Launch**: August 2026
- **Pricing**: Free tier; Pro $7.99/mo or $79.99/yr; Elite $14.99/mo or $149.99/yr. Founder pricing locked for waitlist signups.
- **Differentiator**: Social sabotage mechanic — friends can modify each other's next-day card draws
- **Founder**: Brandon Kessinger (Twitter/X: @KessingerBuilds)
- **TikTok**: @cardhabitapp

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://cardhabitapp.com/): Overview, mechanics, archetypes, and waitlist signup
- [Privacy Policy](https://cardhabitapp.com/privacy): How CardHabit handles user data
